review_text: Fabulous park 👏 👌 😃👍

We love this caravan park in beautiful Echuca and have returned many times. Perfectly placed to walk to everything, good variety of sites and wonderful things that make for a great stay - welcoming staff, a terrific camp kitchen and rec room, a heated outdoor pool and lovely (and separate!} water park for the kids. It also has heating in the bathrooms which makes for a more pleasant year round stay.
Stayed on a caravan site. Close to town, highyl recommended.
Great people running it and great location
One of the best caravan parks that we have stayed in in twenty years of travel
Even though the park was busy everything was clean and working. It's a pretty quiet location, away from major highways.
The ensuite was the best we’ve seen, camp site was well maintained and clean. Power/water easily accessed and the fellow park visitors were friendly, helpful and respectful of others.
This is a wonderful Park. We felt welcome from the start and our site was quiet and easy to access.
We stayed at this caravan park and absolutely loved it. Thought it was fantastic. Looking forward to coming back was a great park.
Loved our stay - everything was excellent
Great caravan park, neat and tidy, friendly staff. Would definitely stay there again

Just a perfect place for a week or two.
Great staff
Absolutely loved staying here, such a great location, easy walk to town we didn’t need to move our car. All staff were very welcoming and helpful. Park is great for families and couples.

P & W drivethrough site was very good. We had a hard gravel pitch for the caravan and stepped out onto a huge patch of artificial grass. The van was much easier to keep clean.

Toilets and gathering room/area facilities were great too. Laundry was $4. Great price.
Awesome value great park dog friendly close to town very well maintained park
Great park for both old and young , very close to Murray River  and town. No need to drive into town only a short 5 minute walk.

Wow have they picked up their act. So impressed.  Sites  clean, amenities spotless. No dripping taps and showers. Grounds so well loved. Staff friendly and very helpful. We've  stayed here for many years and this is the best the park has looked. Great job.
Fantastic location, a 5 minute walk to the Port of Echuca. Great cabins and park with all the amenities you will need. Unable to connect to WIFI, but enjoyed the disconnect to focus on family

Amazing park, well maintained grounds, very family friendly, 2 pools (splash pool for kids), staff are lovely very professional. Felt safe staying there, requires security codes to enter & exit park via boom gates & assess gates around the park. Short walk into town, lovely cafes etc Paddle Steamer is a must.
Would have given 4 stars but a shocka of a site but you get that
Perfect location to explore Echuca and surrounding
Great small park facilities excellent and walking distance to eateries (bowls club pub and our favourite Thai just around the corner)
Great location and facilities. Slightly affected by cabin renovations being performed and a bit of builder debris, not a deal breaker, internet connection was non-existent
We had a caravan site. Wonderful, clean. Close to amenities.  Stayed here a few times. Always ready to go back. Great for families. Close to town and walking trails.
Friendly and helpdul staff, large sites, clean amenities.
Excellent value for unpowered site money, best facilities seen anywhere
Short walk into town. Great camp kitchen
Loved the park and the management was excellent, very kind and polite will most definitely be back.||Management work extremely hard to provide excellent service

NRMA echuca is a lovely park, amenities are good. Walking distance to the main street & murray which is great! Nice size sites.

Unfortunately we had someone pay us a late night visit going through our stuff under our awning. The park really didn't seem to care just told us to call the police next time. Boom gates were constantly stuck in the up position and big holes cut in the fences so anybody could get in at anytime, didn't really feel safe in the 3 nights we were there. The park obviously know they have a problem as a text was sent out daily to remind people to lock everything up/away. First park i have ever been to that have had to do that.
awesome park
Been coming here for 4 yes and can't get a better spot. Clean facilities and can't go past the water park for the kids. Will be booking in for next year for sure
Great pool, position, amenities and value
Absolutely love this park. It's walking distance into Echuca . The park is always clean the cabins are great and they have a new water park area for kids.
A great park. It is very clean and well set out. Easy walking to shops .

A well located park,but NRMA has absolutely packed every vehicle into the space.  Very bright floodlights light up most areas of the park, these lights stay in all night.  After booking online we later contacted the park by phone after waiting 5 minutes we were told to leave a message and they would call us back - they did not.  NRMA road service is brilliant for accommodation there is plenty of room for improvement
Great place to stay. It has a pool and separate children's water park and playground. Very clean BBQ facilities and seating areas.
Great caravan park, close to town. Friendly reception staff, unlike many other parks I've stayed at. Excellent amenities,  and easy drive through sites.

Absolutely loved it 5 stars from me. Lovely Owners. Will be back i have friends booking here as we speak. Loved the shops has everything the icecream shop is a must. But was a little overwhelmed being charged $70 for a dry trim at Hair Boutique.

We cannot be more appreciative of the Staff at the NRMA Echuca Holiday Park during our stay there. The Staff, particularly Danielle, went out of their way to help, following a situation we found ourselves in when we arrived.  Thank you so much for your kindness.

Visuted last weekend (late Jan 2026) this was the first ever holiday away, with my 2 young children, where we didnt stay with family in a family members home. Our time at NRMA was magnificent, kids were super comfortable, splash park was insanely fun, pool was super fun/relaxing! Facilities (bathrooms/shared spaces) were spotless with regular cleans witnessed by staff who were super friendly!
Will definitely return soon! Love it here

Great place to stay under the cabin or caravan as we stayed in the tent and it was hard to put a tent up as the ground was very hard. but would love to go back. There was an incident that some naughty kids threw the water while we showered but the management has taken action quickly and came to visit a couple of times and be firm towards them. Also they helped us to put pegs too. Thank you We felt safe while we stayed there and had an amazing time there.

My family and I loved our stay here. The rooms were well kept and nice and cool. The amenities on site were great! We loved the splash park and BBQ was cleaned for us everyday. Can't wait to stay again!

We camped here in our caravan. Overall I would recommend staying here. The facilities were good and the location was fantastic.
On the negative, the pool needed some maintenance on the side. Amenities could have been cleaned better, pink and black around the plug holes in the sinks. Men's loo had a big skid mark for days.
Great for a holiday.

Been coming here for 30 plus years.
Great Park absolutely love it here.

Would love to rate the place higher but staff attitude tanked the review.

My family booked a cabin for a week, my partner and I stayed in 1 room for 4 days, leaving 1 room (4 beds) untouched. We asked for the main bed to be remade and toiletries restocked as the rest of the family is now coming to stay in the cabin for the remainder of the week. I was met with confusion and annoyance from the reception staff and made to feel like an inconvenience. Idk I don't think its unreasonable to ask for some sort of cleaning to happen for a whole week stay?

Stayed at NRMA Holiday park for 4 nights very clean and comfortable cabins with new appliances and benches and bathroom all new.Very friendly staff very well kept facilities eg bbqs cleaned regular.We will be back again soon.

15min walk to the port. Had all you may need, kitchen, water park, river. Was extremely hot camping out in sun, but didnt want to risk being under gums. So stayed mostly at the port or near river in the shade, but was a close place to come home to. The staff was helpful too.
Was such a great stay and the location is perfect . Pool was clean but watch the tiles as slippery.  Highly recommend 👌

We had a lovely 1 night stay a NRMA Echuca
We were place into the last available site
Thank you because we did not book ahead 🤗
The site was a corner one next to a charming 50s Coffee van that had an equally lovely woman running it.
That also made us directly in front of the children’s water park.
The sound of the water park was very relaxing
The water was turned off at 7pm and even being a Friday night the park went silent 🤫 and peaceful 😌
Thank you for a lovely stay 😀

Had a good site with clean facilities and park is well located.
BUT… loud partying by a large group at the park until midnight was not appreciated nor was it addressed and stopped.  Loud conversations by some people in the park into the wee hours of the morning made matters worse. So much for 10pm noise restrictions expectations.
It has made for a difficult day with no sleep work and travel being involved as well. Extremely unhappy and will not book a stay at this park again in future for any reason.
I feel for any other patrons at the park as many would have been adversely affected, particularly if they needed sleep before travelling or had small children.
I have never experienced this in any park I’ve stayed at over many years of travel so really disappointed.
Great location and cabins were in excellent condition.
Really enjoyed our stay here, great level sites, clean ammenities, with helpful staff and an easy walk into Echuca.
Perfect location Main Street walking distance. Park is beautiful with a pool and kids splash park absolutely love this park.

Beautiful park. Camp kitchen is well maintained and lots of seating. Sites are a little off level. Some more than others. Close to Echuca wharf. Short walking distance. Friendly staff. Checked in with ease.

We recently stayed here for 8 days. The location is great, a short stroll into town. They have nice drive through sites with artificial grass and not so nice dusty dirty sites. All at the same price. They initially put us in a tiny dirty site and when we asked for another site they said they couldn’t find any except the long term storage sites (dusty and dirty). Another couple who did not like their site eventually swopped with us as our site suited them. There are 3 amenity blocks. Two are new and modern. The one near us was very
old although it was kept clean. There is a coffee van on site and a good camp kitchen and lots of activities for kids. So beware of what site you are given. I presume they are getting around to upgrading them all but everyone is paying the same.

Wow what a HUGE park. We were lucky  enough to score a drive through site towards the back of the park. It was a synthetic surface and very uneven, however nothing a level and chocks can't fix.

The amenties were very close and kept very clean and tidy.

It was not surprising that the park was so busy, as it is only a 10min walk to the Euchuca Wharf and town centre. We actually checked into our drive through site at 1.15pm and were able to walk to the wharf and get onto a paddlesteamer by 1.30! True story 🙂

The reception staff were very warm and welcoming. If we had more time we definitely would of stayed longer.

I found this park over priced at $51 per night. The showers had chipped tiles, and shower walls and grout had orange/brown stain halfway up. I thought it just old, but it was gooey mould as it scrapped off with my finger nail. Not great!
Very busy . Packed in

We stayed at the park in a Cabin Waratah 38. One week ago.
We were very disappointed as the cabin is in such a bad state . The toilet system is so old and smelt like raw sewerage. Which smelt into the Bedroom and Kitchen area. The Cabin was dirty full of cob webs. Damaged bench top. The shower had a bad rotten patch leaking on the floor. The skirt boards so old. It doesn't take much with a bit of paint to update. The Exhaust fans were disgusting full of dust and fluff. The fan switch in the Bathroom was loose.
Not to mention the out side was just red dust , could do with mulch , stone's or artificial grass. Around the Cabins. The staff were cleaning the Artificial grass on the Caravan sites blowing dust all over the Vans Cars and Cabins OMG .Very disappointed 😞

Sites tight and very uneven. Flooded the amenities while cleaning(2pm) still very wet at 9pm. Kids splash park looked good(no children) washing machines good. Only 1 of 4 dryers working. Weeds throughout all gardens. Some sites are dirty, feel for the people on them paying the same price as people on full fake grass sites.
bedroom underlay sheet not clean, noisy at night if your near bbq area

We stayed in Banksia cabin. Cabin was tired and much in need of an update.|I noticed doona cover had a bit of an odour like it hadn’t been washed recently.|Bunks are tiny.  2nd bedroom had four bunks. Can’t imagine 4 people sleeping in tiny room which was pretty much taken up entirely by bunks.|Main bedroom was better but blinds on window had seen better days.|The park itself is lovely with good facilities and easy walk to town.
Great caravan park. Well kept.

Can’t speak highly enough of this park.  Friendly staff, clean amenities, beautiful gardens, large sites.  Huge pool and also water fun park.   Very close to historical part of Echuca.  Close to paddle steamer rides.  Don’t miss the Echuca After Hours tour.  Will definitely return.  Thank you to the staff

Very Clean and Quiet Park, Staff were very helpful.  Lots for the kids to do and close to town.

Will come back
Spent 5 days at this great park in our caravan..Walking distance to town,and right on the murray river we will be back.
Great staff. Best location to park and car and leave it whilst exploring
Quiet peaceful environment

Multiple visits and still a favourite. Value for money. Clean and safe caravan park. Excellent amenities and park facilities. Drive thru sites make life easy.

Close to town, easy walking distance into ‘port of Echuca’.

Very well run park with excellent facilities. We had an en suite caravan site that was very convenient. This is one of the best parks we have camped in and was next to the river and boats.
Also good value for NRMA members.
Brilliant if you have young kids & handy for a getaway an easy walk to town
Very generous

Stayed 3 days. Very conveniently close to Murray River and the shops. Amenities were good. It was advertised as having WiFi access but we couldn't connect. Lucky we had good internet access through our phones.
Another great park, awesome front office staff. Always helpful,  close to town and peaceful quiet place to stay for a night or more
Friendly staff, very helpful. We had a good location, close to amenities.  Definitely a great place to stay
Huge park area with all the expected facilities which are well maintained. Water park area, playground and pool for families. Short walk in to the main park of Echuca

Stayed here for 4 nights at an ensuite powered site. Absolutely wonderful, ensuite was clean, site was easy to park on. Plenty of room, close to walk to the Wharf. Right next to Murray River, can walk to river to see paddle steamers go up and down.
We we could have stayed longer.

Fantastic cabins
Well set up cabins
Staff very friendly and cooperative
Really enjoyed our visit
Camped on power sites, great location, staff and facilities.  Beautiful well maintained park
Lovely park and space. Old toilets but clean.
BUCKET TIME!!!

Beautiful place for a getaway.
Great staff helpful, sort walk to cbd
Lovely caravan park. Clean amenities and quiet surroundings. It is within walking distance to town. Loved it

Fantastic place to stay. Good price. Amazing free water play area with water slides inside the park. Also has its own playground and basketball court. Right next to the Murray river. Walking distance to the town / shops/ port echuca.
Stayed on powered site. Was excellent.
Great weekend away!

Very central .  Easy to navigate with caravan .  Clean and  peaceful caravan park . Echuca is lovely fantastic food eateries  pubs good old fashioned service  lovely old buildings historical.  in fact, the whole Riverina  area  is stunning . The surrounding area is magnificent . Bird life is amazing. kerang wetlands and enviroment   are beautiful.

We booked a site for  7 nights
A lovley location , our spot was located beside the Murray 👌 great staff ,clean communal kitchen ,the indoor bbq's are amazing a 5 star for that .

Unfortunately
Broken locks on the female amenities
The toilet Shower Blocks closest to the entrance /office need an UPGRADE /REPAIRS !!!URGENTLY  & also the disabled amenities situated in the same block ,NO HEATING  at all was PROVIDED /or working !!!, especially when having showers, a cold snap of 6°in the  evening  for the whole stay definitely made it extremely uncomfortable when having showers ,this has been an ongoing issue with the heating ,and also  not been able to close the doors to keep the cold out was out rages ,This needs to be addressed  URGENTLY ! Heating systems need to be repaired for  the comfort of paying guests!! .
Doors on the female amenities with broken code locks need to be repaired also .

Apart from the above .
I highly recommend the park itself

Love echuca and stayed in a cabin here.
Very comfortable and clean
Will be back in the future

Fabulous park with great facilities. Nice large grassy sites.  We had an ensuite van site. What a pleasant surprise to find a large clean ensuite with fluffy hand towel, face washers and bathmat, as well as toiletries.  Very reasonably priced.  The park has a huge water park, swimming pool, massive fully equipped camp kitchen and heaps more.  Very conveniently located, it's a short walk to shops, restaurants,  cafes and tourist attractions.
Highly recommend this park.

A last minute booking when we found the free camping was closed.  Excellent service, immaculate amenities, super close to town.

Will definitely be back.
Amazing Caravan park. The splash park, pool and being so close to the Murray makes it a perfect holiday location
Great place clean and tidy

A tidy, clean, modern park with large drive through synthetic sites. Park divided into sections - caravan sites, cabins and then annual/semi perm sites. Right on the Murray River and walking distance to Port of Echuca, ‘old world’ shops, cafes and breweries. Highly recommend
Nice spot bit crowed
Great place to stay, sites are huge and amenities are clean and new

Great location. Great pool. But the amenities block needs some very much needed cleaning maintenance. Cobwebs absolutely everywhere. Just look at the washing machines in the laundry room  cobwebs everywhere. Amenities could really use a big high pressure clean

We were put in a spot that was all dirt, no mat no concrete pad. When we called and said the spot beside us was vacant they said we could use it for the night. I wanted to call and ask about this as their map clearly states our site has a mat and power! This is suppose to be an nrma flagship and we are trapsing dirt everywhere. Will stay this one night and look elsewhere for the next 4 nights. Not happy that we were paying nrma rates for dirt!!!
Love it .. so clean and well spaced out.

We booked a powered site in early January for the first week of April - school holidays but we were meeting friends there.  We were disappointed with our site - so short we could only just squeeze our motorhome on it, and it was difficult getting it level as the site very humped.  The nearest amenities block (east) is very old, not cleaned very thoroughly, lacking shelving in the showers, never any paper towels and just one antiquated hand dryer.   I asked to be moved but was told they were full - but we saw plenty of empty sites over the 5 days we were there.  We chose to walk to one of the newer amenities blocks as they were much much cleaner.|Having had my grumble about the poor site and amenities, the park is on the whole a nice place and very conveniently located.

Great location, park is quiet at night and the water park for the kids is fantastic but that's about it.
The cabins need to be upgraded internally. They look tied and run down. The main bed mattress is hard as a rock and I'm finding I'm waking up with a sore back. You get what you pay for I suppose. Our cabin backs onto a main road and one night the same car would drive up at night very slowly to check what is left out between the cabins but I'm one step ahead of them. If you have expensive bikes etc, put them into your cabin at night.
Great location with plenty of things to do
Stayed here one night. as a family in a cabin. Really well located. Kids loved the water park. Free BBQ was put to good use. Morning walk around Port Of Echuca was fun.

Terrible RUDE  young girl at front desk dark hair ..I was booking for our family to arrive in 4 days this girl was so rude I didn't want to keep talking to her she rolled her eyes 3 separate times and made me feel stupid we have been travelling using parks for 12mths full time on the road and this is the worst service I've seen . The park kids area closed and no times days it would be running again. The park has small width sites and full of 70 plus aged people.
We Cancelled our booking went 5mins away for much more everything price amenities things to do and bigger sites.

Great park fantastic facilities all round, cleanest toilets/showers ever
Staff are great and very helpful
Short walk to shops and paddle boats
Echuca has everything one needs, great place
Very friendly town

Great park right on the edge of town and next to the boat ramp.
Perfect facilities for young and older kids alike.
Would recommend...
Good position. Pity the amenities weren't clean.
What a great park.
Fantastic caravan park, best I've been to so far, I've been to 10 others in my Campervan.
Everything was great, until I lay down on the bed and the springs made that horrible noise and I woke up in pain.

We stayed in the Holiday Park , caravan sight with ensuite, loved the ensuite, site was very clean well detailed, maintained giving a very comfortable clean relaxing atmosphere, the Park is very well maintained, facilities great as well as friendliness as you check in, will be back again and looking forward to it.
Great park good priceing

We stay two days in a lovely ,reasonably  new cabin for 6 people & there was only 2 people, it was very spacious, catered for all our needs including a washing machine & dryer, the 1 problem was that there wasn't enough towel hooks or a cupboard in the bathroom. The park itself was perfect, & staff very helpful.
Would definitely stay again.
Camped on a unpowered Site with Family. Plenty of Facilities.  Staff are awesome. Barely used a torch as we had nearby stadium like lamp poles. Fantastic very relaxing stay.
We had a caravan site - great location, very well maintained with excellent amenities and friendly staff. Would not hesitate to stay there again.

We stayed on site for 3 nights and were well impressed with location and the facilities. The water park was a hit with lots of kids and the pool was large and inviting.

The synthetic grass sites are such a plus as they always look good and no mess in your van.

Lots of walking tracks close by and under 10 minutes into the middle of the tourist part of town. Oh and dog friendly.

Don't go in school holidays, too many kids. Our caravan near the pool. 8am to 8pm noise
But the park is very clean and weell kept. Friendly staff
In a motorhome, amenities great, camp kitchen immaculate and plenty of tables and chairs, great value when a NRMA member $33 a night on a powered site. Easy walk into town along the river path

Hands down, this holiday park is the bee's knees! We were knackered from the long drive, but the friendly staff and, oh boy, the water park! The kids went absolutely bonkers when they saw it, and we hadn't even been told about it when we booked, so it was a fantastic surprise for the kids, they practically lived at the water park the whole time! We only stayed for three nights, but we did try to extend our stay, so bummed that they were booked out. The pool is a great size, the games room, laundry, and other facilities are easy to get to, and everything is within walking distance. The cabins are a great size, and the parking is pretty spacious too. The only thing that was no good is that you can hear everything from other people's cabins - it's like they're right there in the room with you! So, if you're a light sleeper, you might want to bring some earplugs. The chairs being moved in the cabins sound like thunder 😂 And, on a gross note, the doona had some, ahem, interesting stains on it, so maybe bring your own bedding, just in case. But, all in all, we're already planning our next stay, so thanks for the awesome time away from home!

Stopped here in December just before Xmas to just before new year . When we arrived the people next to us told us to watch out for theives taking thing out of the annex  they have signs up no skateboard in the park speed limit inside the park 5 klm at all times . E scooters are a absolute menace and dangerous to older people using walkers . They were flying around everywhere cutting corners parents did absolute nothing . Then at the toilets and showers e scooters just thrown on the ground had to remove them to get into the showers . Management did nothing at all never saw them coming into the paRk enforcing regulations in the park at all . Only ever saw the cleaners.  Caravan are not a place for e scooters they are not a toy .and management should be enforcing all of the regulations in the park . E scooters should be banned inside the park the same as skateboards . There is going to be a serious accident with these  e scooters.  Management need to take a stance on this now . It's a caravan park not a race track for e scooters . Very dangerous park .
Great park. All modern clean facilities. Walking distance to the port.

This is a great Park.  Credit to NRMA for the work on the drive thru sites.  Beautiful gardens, astro turf, sullage and water.  Location is great - about a 7-8 minute walk into town.  Staff were friendly and the amenities block near us (though old) was adequate.  Camp kitchen was well appointed.  Have been here twice and will come back again.

Great place for a vacation. It was hot, so the pool got a lot of use. The cabins are comfortable and air conditioned. There was a BBQ, so we ate outside most evenings.
The park is a short walk to town and is located right near the historic port of Echuca.

Stayed with friends who have a caravan. Great location just a short walk into town. The bathrooms always clean. Great park for the kids have a great water park and pool.
People friendly.

Been staying here for nearly 30 years. Great location to walk into town to shop or eat out. Awesome grassed drive through sites, new toilet block and kids splash park. Staff are friendly and accommodating.

We have been staying here at Easter time for 37 years
Great location and park keeps improving for the kids

Wonderful stay in a Banksia Cabin over the Christmas period. Air conditioning was turned on cooling the cabin upon arriving which was very welcomed given the outside temp was mid 30’s. Location of the cabin opposite the kids water park and within 100 metres of the expansive inground heated pool was lovely. Amenities were very clean, lawns and gardens well maintained, staff welcoming and friendly. Highly recommend for everyone. Short walking distance to Port of Echuca and town.
Park is alot of fun, we had a great powered site but noticed a few others were tight.
Great place for camping. Quiet, you can walk to town for all your needs. Have a meal a few drinks all nice and handy. Good for children a new water feature area is nearly finished.
We've always loved this place but the new splash zone is FANTASTIC the adults had as much fun as the kids! ☺️
Stayed in our van and thr amenities are clean and thr kids loved thr splash park and pool.
Absolutely amazing park... decided to stay extra time simply because of the quality of the park...plenty to do for families and short distance to town centre.  Would absolutely stay here again.

The Hoilday Park was amazing, and the water play area + pool was quite well maintained. The staff was polite and in general, we were happy with the overall experience.

The cabins, however, we were not very happy with them... It wasnt as clean - the floors could have used a bit of mopping to take off the juice stains from the previous occupants, a lot of cobwebs around the corners, the outside sitting area was very unclean, the patio furnitures were covered in dust and webs.
Great stay here, small sites and geared more for families and kids.
Schöne Anlage, alles Sauber. Guter Ausgangspunkt für Ausflüge in der umliegende Umgebung.

Fantastic location right on the Murray( you can hear the paddle steamers💕) easy short walk to port along the banks of the Murray and everything In Echuca.
The park is amazing with generous caravan sites synthetic grass or  covered ground. There’s a fabulous heated pool and seperate amazing kids water play area.  Everywhere is clean and well maintained. We were very impressed 👏🏻
Nice clean cabins
Great place very clean and tidy great service

Had a great time at this caravan park.
Great location and excellent park for the kids.

A bit hit and miss for caravan sites. Some sites are well grasses and maintained, some sites are gravel and artificial grass which may be ok in cooler months but bloody hot in summer with a dog to contend with and then there are sites which are like the desert parks not a blade of grass and red dust everywhere.  The facilities are good but with keypad exit and entry not very covid friendly. The greatest asset of this park is its location to Echuca township. With the Feb 21 covid scare they shut the park and threw everyone out, a bit of customer service problem right there.
Update
The sites at this park have been updated and you would be hard pressed to find a bad site.
Amenities need an update but are still usable.

Arrived here at this loverly caravan park for 2 nights stayed in acorn family cabin .
On arrival was greeted by a loverly , friendly receptionist Danielle .
The caravan park grounds are very well maintained and exceptionally clean
The cabin was spotless and clean could not fault it in any way.
I would highly recommend anyone who is looking for a caravan park to stay in Echuca stay at the NRMA Echuca holiday park.
We will definitely be coming back for future holidays here.
Thank you.
Linda , Neil Kirk.
22.10.24 to 24.10 24 stay.
Enjoyed 4 days here in a caravan.

this place was horrific
terrible ladies at reception
security door not lockable reported twice
no atmosphere
would never stay again
Park is well maintained with clean and tidy facilities
Wonderful place which caters for members of the family great playgrounds water park and wonderful swimming pool amenities are spotless.

Stayed 2 nights, easy stay, no fuss. Booking and check in were seamless. Great comfortable stay. Would absolutely stay there again. |Splash zone Park, playground, tennis court, heated pool. Lots to do for even a relaxing day at the park. :)  :)

Great spot close to town,easy walking distance along the walking track by the river.
Park amenities were modern and clean.
Great staff ,new large van sites,clean modern amenities 👍10+

This place was horrific,
Not all amenities were functional, and were not told about this, the games room was shut early because the rain was coming, advertised heated pool was like an ice block, dump point was non functional and had waste running down the gutter 🤮 list goes on and were not told about anything.
Got robbed whilst we were there, cars and cabins broken into and the staff couldn't care less and rude
Absolutely no empathy at all, did not feel safe here especially with my 2 kids that are under 10
Booked a group booking and we were all over the park not next to each other.
I have sent numerous emails back and fourth and had to wait weeks on end for replys, I did get a little bit of assistance from these emails however no where near good enough
Enter at own risk
Shame on you NRMA Caravan Park Shame
Huge holiday park with good facilities
Stayed in our caravan on powered site, new facilities are great, pool, playground, camp kitchen, etc,etc, well be back next year
Stayed 2 nights in cold July. Very comfortable, clean and tidy.
Great place to stay been here before and will come and stay again that's for sure well kept grounds and facilities great price and people and dog friendly

We stayed in a cabin that was well equipped. Pretty much everything you would need for a comfortable stay. I'd much rather stay here then a hotel or motel. We were next to a road so it was a bit noisy in the mornings. The staff were very friendly and very helpful.
What a great park we will be back so friendly pets allowed keep up the good work guys

This place is so. I would love to keep it a hidden secret. Our accomadation fell through at the last minute and even thpugj the were busy they were able to find us somewhere to stay th night. We will be back
Undergoing extensive renovations, so you need to put up with noise, dust and trucks

I would give the park a wide bearth if you were thinking of staying here at the moment. With the amount of building and earthwork going on it's like camping at a construction site. When I booked for the victorian winter school holidays there was no mention of these works being undertaking on either when I spoke to the park on the phone or listed on their website. If I had of known this I would have stayed elsewhere. Our stay was not very pleasent which was disappointing.
Nice place to visit.

Not great very disappointing most of the washing machines and dryers don't work.
Woken up at 7 by tradies whipping up ensuites, cabins and new mobile home spaces.Smelt of chemicals mostbof the time.Im sure the upgrades are going to be great but why not get new washers and dryers so your guests can do their washing .
I have used other big parks and have been very happy.
Not good at all would not go again

I had a problem with my van so l booked a cabin, l was very happy ,the cabin was great in size had everything l wanted l was impressed. I thought the price was reasonable. This park is also  very kid friendly. I would absolutely come back.

This caravan park is clean and well cared for. They're replacing their old facilities with new more modern buildings. In fact the new block is heated which is very nice in winter. The staff are friendly and keep the park neat and tidy. The drive through powered sites are very easy to manoeuvre with plenty of room on a false lawn site. This park is within walking distance to the town and Port of Echuca sights.

The location is perfect for visiting Echuca.
Just a short stroll along the river to the discovery centre, where you can purchase tickets for the paddle boat.
A short stroll into town.
Staff are friendly.

We had a drive-through site, which was big enough for our 8mt van.
Amenities were clean and tidy.
Water park area looked fun for the kids.
Dogs allowed also.

Only downfall ( if I had to have one) was they had renovations in full swing.
But it wasn't that much of a problem, to be honest.

Excellent caravan park, clean perfect location right near the Murray river and a short walk to the town centre. We will be going to this spot again in the near future and would like to highly recommend it to others.

Booked powered sites 38 & 39 two mths ago due to size of vans.  Arrived & told we were now on sites 40 & 41 which were smaller sites. Site 41 is at end of road & van projected onto road rear & front.  Complaint at office they were indifferent & quote "change of circumstances madam" but could not explain why. Sites 38 & 39 were occupied by others.  Won't be coming back. Been NRMA member 40 yrs.
Great park , will be back

What a great place! Spacious and immaculately looked after grounds. A wide range of cabins atbery reasonable prices as well as beautiful van and camping grounds.  A most wonderful welcome from Taryn. We were upgraded to one of the Rosewood cabins which was large and spacious and with a very comfortable queen size bed! Loved the little touches like fluffy towels and cookies. The children's wet area really has to be seen to be believed! Coming back...this time with grandchildren!

Caravan stay Couple. Have been on previous years. Had booked a particular site 10-12 months prior Had two phone calls to confirm site as we heard renovations were taking place only to get to park and find site not available and we were moved to another site which was inappropriate size for our caravan. Requested another site and after eye role and a “tut tut” from staff and a verbal “ well you know we are full It makes it difficult for us “ we were finally moved to a more appropriate site. I certainly question the term “ full” as we had sites vacant for the whole 5 days we were there. Spoke to other members of our group virtually treated the same with pre site bookings not being honoured and told “park full this is only site available” and then to have vacant sites seen over their stay. My opinion some office staff need to know site measurements and caravan measurements before booking small vans into large sites and large van into small sites. Very poor service by office staff. Park itself has had some parts where major work done and there was work being undertaken still Good to see them spend some money on upgrades. Current Works a bit of a hassle but acceptable. Kids water park and swimming pool. Good size camp kitchen some new cabins but a fair ratio of cabins to caravan sites and with new site upgrades it will be impressive when finished. There are three amenities blocks  which are exceptionally cleaned. Middle toilet book has broken out of order toilets and need a few clothes hooks in shower block to replace broken ones but very clean All toilets blocks getting a bit past there date. Plenty hot water and good pressure. Free WIFI. Walking distance to town Cafes and pubs. TV reception OK Ground staff friendly and willing to stop and have chat. Good security lighting Some  BBQ areas effected by current works ( can’t be helped)

Caravan Stay couple. Booked a site ( with our group) 12 months prior ( every year the same site) Confirmed twice as we heard major work going on in park and site was confirmed Got to park and was told site not available and we were put in another small spot which was inappropriate to size of caravan when asked for another site got and eye role and verbal “ we are full you know It makes it hard for us” I question the term “ full” as 5 days we stayed saw a number of vacant sites available My opinion one office staff need short course customer relations. Park itself currently undergoing site renovations which will be good for caravan stays Good to see park investing in caravan sites instead of cabins. Water park for kids and seperate swimming pool. Three amenities blocks which a very clean. Some need maintenance work, broken toilets, toilets seats not secured and broken clothes hooks need replacing. Free wifi Good TV reception. Grounds clean and ground staff friendly and will stop for a chat. Easy walk into town for cafes and pubs Good security lighting. Star rating effected by initial staff contact
Small toilet and bath room great camp kitchen

Very big caravan park located on the main st of Echuca. Walking  distance to everything. Very well equipped but does get very busy due to its location. Cabins are modern and comfortable. Paradise for kids.
Great to see they are updating the park, making it more user-friendly.

First time visitor.  Not impressed.  Site steep and little room to manoeuvre round tree and cabin.  On booking length of van advised.  Finally setup only to find no power to site.  Apparently management advised by several persons and groundsman about no power to site a week before. Amenities below par.  Wrong identification on taps in showers.  Could not recommend.
Our second stay here was nothing like our first stay. Facilities are starting to rundown and quite a few OUT OF ORDER  signs about . Our site was hard to access due to it being steep and tight .
We had a great time but wished we had a tv in the main bedroom!! Overall nice relaxing and close to the main st!!
Quite and close to centre of town
Would have given it a big 5 star if not for the dirty toilets.

Dit caravan en camper park waar je ook huisjes kan huren is heel mooi en heel netjes en naast de Murry river gelegen.|Van uit de camping kan je in goed in tien minuten lopen naar het centrum.|Het is voor de kinderen een prima camping er is een zwembad om te zwemen en één om te spelen er is ook speeltuin.|De camping keuken is perfect en schoon.|Het personeel is erg vriendelijk en attent.|Een camping om terug te komen.
Has made some solid improvements over the past 1-2 years. Enjoyed my stay once again.

We stayed on a powered site that had no grass and was very dusty, The amenities block was sloshed over with a mop and the soap dispenser closest to the door was empty or broken our entire 5 day stay. In the male stalls there was spit and flem on the walls , although this is a disgusting act by patrons it should be cleaned.above the showers the windows don’t appear to ever been cleaned and the spider webs are everywhere.

We have a powered site for our caravan. come here every year for the cricket tournament. book site next to fellow team member 1 yr in advance.  arrive this year to find they have moved us from our site of 2 yrs to another across the road. our friends still in original site.  when i queried why are we moved, REPLY was we reserve the right to move anybody to any site.   sites are not guaranteed.  i would think that when someone books a specific site 1 yr in advance (and same site for the previous 2 yrs) that the absolute the management should do is advise before you have traveled 5 hrs towing a van and you are standing at reception. They have the right to relocate you but i should have the right to cancel if i am not happy, in advance not on the day. Very poor communication, and customer service for comeback clients.  Park has a lot of our team members staying here, we will be discussing if we come back again.
Caravan site. Very busy big park. Pool and water park
Great park, good price.

Large caravan park, a bit over crowded.
Would prefer slightly bigger sites and reduce number.
Had a corner site that was pretty dusty.
Close to tourist attractions.

Honestly we didn't have the best experience staying here, our powered sight was riddled with Bull ants and it was hard to get a good angle with the camper as we were jammed over under a power line and next to council road works... (no fault of the parks) we carried out a two week trip off north west Vic and unfortunately out of the 12 - 13 places we stayed this left memories for all the wrong reasons, ammenaties were not the cleanest..paid up front for two nights but left after the first night dissapointed with no refund offered... We cut our Echuca visit short and left after that and continued on our journey.....the staff were polite.... 👍

Really enjoy our visit, close to town, walking distance.
Great amenities, would be great with children, pool and water park.

A great park.  We had an impromptu stay here.  Facilities were great, including the camp kitchen and pool.  It was great that they had the separate water park for the kids.  The kidney bus having somewhere to operate from was amazing.  To provide a service so people on dialysis could go on a holiday was a fantastic idea.
First time here great park great staff park is very clean compared to others we have been to over the years great location close to everything 👍
Beautiful park to stay in..great clean tidy amenities, large communal kitchen, lovely friendly front reception, easy walk to town centre.  Highly recommended a visit to beautiful Echuca.

stayed 5 nights and were satisfied with our acacia cabin. My problem is the bathroom corners had not been cleaned properly in a very long time, the ceiling fans needed a good clean and there was damage to the ceiling in the bunk room. Noticed  in checking and making sure nothing was left behind. Double bed kept moving  and the backs of the kitchen chairs had greasy finger prints on them. Sorry I am a bit anal in the house. The floors were not especially clean but I put that down to the dust from the storm. Apart from that the price was acceptable and the position to town was great. The site was fabulous and the ducks (hahaha) were very  friendly. We enjoyed our time and would recommend this to friends as long as they made sure the price was okay.

Not a good start to our stay, the first allocated site was occupied by someone who didn't bother to tell reception they had moved.
The next site offered was being watered.
On my third visit to reception I thought they would be sick of me, but just the opposite, the young lady was very apologetic even though it wasn't her fault.
Ended up with a lovely grass site.
Enjoyed the experience

Called to book 4 sites mid December told bookings open from 1st of February so I called then at 10am only to be told they open to new bookings from 14th as they need 2 weeks to sort of previous years new bookings then will open to new bookings.
Thought I'd call today 8th feb to try book and now I'm told everything is booked out .
This is an absolute joke!!
Very friendly staff good prices great communication when we had an issue with our van while we were out.

This would have to be one of the best caravan Parks we have stayed at in Australia. I know it's a big say but the place is so great, drive through sites, pool, kid's water park, clean, a credit to the staff and management.

Stayed in my Winabago great little park on the river would have liked to park on some grass but it was fine close to facilities was good there location was excellent you just walk to everything no need to drive bus service across the border,fantastic loved it.
Loved the pool, water park

We had a powered caravan site. While the site we were allocated was way to small for our caravan, a quick call to the office saw us moved to a much more appropriate site. Amenities are very clean and well maintained, as is the whole park.  We’d certainly choose to stay there again.

Amenities...no toilet paper..

Office hours...facebook says one thing...sign on office door...says different

Laundry...4 dryers all work
3 washers...1 works
Great park with heaps of activities for kids.  Splash park and pool is very popular.  Walking distance to town.  Camp kitchen and bbqs in great condition too. Will definitely be back
Stayed in the caravan park.

Lovely holiday park with new waterplay area.
We enjoyed our 2nd stay here & will be back. We like all the school holiday activities too!

I just wish there was more seating provided around the pool

Amazing park, clean facilities, splash park is so great for the kids. Shout out to Taryn (hope I’ve got that right) she was amazing.
Will definitely be back next year 🙌🏻

Amazing park and facilities.
Water park is something special for kids of all ages.
Special mention to Tarryn who was the most wonderful staff member I've dealt with in any industry for a long time.
My family will 100% be back to this park.

Amazing park, unbeatable location.
Great amenities.  Have an amazing slushy machine with big range of flavours. Check it out.

From the moment we were greeted by Danielle we felt great about our decision to stay at this park. Danielle was helpful, informative, charming & welcoming. We were given a rundown of local attractions/ coffee spots & a newsletter of local events/things to do. Introduced to the ‘swap’ library of books & dvd’s & given several options as to where we might like to put our van.
The park has great facilities: pool, tennis court, playground & is in easy walking distance to town, paddle steamer wharf, fishing & canoeing. Great for easy bike riding across the river to Moama.
Our amenities block was very clean but a little outdated when compared to the new facilities block :) We had a great 4 days in Echuca & will be back to stay at this park.

Pleasantly set out van park, plenty of travellers, great location.
Easy stroll to the cafes and eateries.
Very close to the paddle steamers, and a magical dog walking track (about 5 ks) along the river.
Big caravan park clean amenities brand new near pool. Big water park nearly finished for kids. Kids will love it.

This is an excellent park to stay at. It is right on the Murray River & a beautiful little walk to the main street of echuca.  The park has all the conveniences that you could want from a caravan holiday park.. it also has great sites for your caravan..
We were in a caravan... wish we had stayed longer. Walk along the Murray River, which is right next door, and walk the main street  as well.

We've just booked for a 2nd stay. Requested a powered site and was even able to choose where we'd like to be placed! The phone and office staff are all friendly and very flexible as we had to rearrange our bookings - nothing was too much trouble. The park is in a quiet spot near the river. Facilities were very clean. Definitely recommend.
Very nice NRMA Holiday Park. Excellent facilities & friendly staff. Quite close to the River Murrey & not far from the shopping precincts here.
I think it was overpriced for what we got.
Good little overnighter

Perfect location to see Echuca from.
All within walking distance.

Very close walk too the paddle steamer's
And beautiful port town. Well kept quiet park.
Very comfortable and well maintained. Close location to the main attractions and the Murray River . Short drive into town.
Great dog friendly caravan park! Very clean, easy check in, quiet atmosphere, great facilities and family friendly. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Always welcoming friendly staff and the campers kitchen is well equipped and air-conditioned and everything is so clean.
Great cabins and RV sites and super friendly staff. Full large camp kitchen and new water park is being built now.
The Place Was Good
Great stay. New works happening . Looks like a water park. Has a pool good for families and kids.
Easy walk into town.  Very friendly managers and staff who made our stay enjoyable.  Will definitely be visiting again.
A very enjoyable caravan stay
Friendly staff, quiet park.
Great location, excellent van sites.
The Caravan Park unit, was spacious, comfortable and enjoyable. Great customer service with excellent facilities. I highly recommend this NRMA Caravan Park.

*THERE WAS MOULD IN THE BATHROOM*||The Aircon filters were filthy.   The sofa had a large tear in the material. Tap fittings were from the 70's as was the cabin. There was a build up of dust / spider webs around the light fittings.

They have a great camp kitchen. Not that I used it as we got a cabin. Would suit campers. Loved our stay here with loads of things for entertaining the kids. Got to see a kangaroo in the park in the late afternoon.
Great caravan park on the edge of town
Great spot close to walking shops 😁😁

Great facilities with a magnificent camp kitchen, spotless amenities and a heated pool. Roomy caravan sites are easy accessible and a lovely setting by the Murray River. A short hike into town. Highly recommended.

NRMA Echuca holiday park Amazing park Amazing location Amazing cabin Amazing Staff We stayed two nights in redwood cabin it was a beautiful cabin to stay in it was perfect for us the park it’s self was beautiful and clean actually spotless as was our beautiful cabin very happy the staff were amazing Indianna  you made us feel so welcome and you were extremely helpful and so kind   on arrival and  the manager dannielle and co worker sorry I didn’t know you name   on departure you were so kind  and very helpful  thank you for  everything think you did for us we will be back next year highly recommend. NRMA Echuca  beautiful stay beautiful park beautiful staff  there was something wrong with the  boom gate we couldn’t get out and it was 5:45 am  thank you Dannielle   I understand  you were on duty but it was so appreciated especially at that time of morning thank you to the lady at the office who gave our son an extra key  to use so appreciated it’s all of these little things  made a for a wonderful stay   😊❤️

Fantastic caravan park. Very friendly staff.
The facilities are amazing with a magnificent camp kitchen, spotless amenities and a heated pool. Roomy caravan sites are easy accessible and a love setting by the Murray River. A short hike into town. Highly recommended.
Have had 3 nights here. Leave tomorrow. Very handy to everything near the port and the river cruises. Would recommend

Honestly there was a lot to like about this park. Its amenities and services in general were very nice and the park is laid out well.

However the amenities near the "drive through" spot we had were filthy and crowded. They looked like they hadn't been properly cleaned in months. Plus the boom gates in both directions were faulty and missing making me question the parks security in general.

But this pales in comparison to the issue of the noise from the nearby street racing and burnouts occurring long long long into the night. The noise kept us awake till 4am. The cars were very close to the park and extremely loud.

After the long tiring drive to get there at the start of our even longer journey it was a very unwelcome start of our holiday.

I wouldn't stay there again.
The location of this park is fantastic just a short walk into town. The facilities are amazing, huge and clean. Dog friendly too 👏

Stayed in our van on large drive thru site. Great place with good facilities. Good hot showers.
Variety of villas, sites, yents. Great heated pool kids enjoying in July. 😁
Takes dogs,  need to be leashed. We dont have a dog but okay with them being around.

We booked one of the synthetic mat drive thru sites for a weekend in early July. Stud park itself is in a great position within a few hundred metres of the main strip. The site was fantastic and a generous size. We loved the fact we didn’t need to use our matting. Even after some rain it drained away quickly. Bonus was having the pool open in winter…29deg was like a bath. The kids loved it. The amenities closest to us were just a little too old and prob in need of an upgrade. We used the new facilities at the Rec Room.
When booking in we had a bit of a hiccup, but the lady at reception went way beyond to help sort the booking. Have been here before and will return again.
Very nice park, great service and walking distance to shops.

We have been to several parks past three months and this park rates 5 out of 5 for us.
Friendly, clean, modern and reasonably priced.
Lovely, clean tidy park! Great for kids & walking distance to CBD. Will definetly choose this Caravan park to stay in near future 😉

Good facilities, good location. Really disappointing that we weren't told beforehand that the kids playgroud was under construction and fenced off with no access, would have booked somewhere else as this is an important thing to have for our family. Powered Site 111 was also disappointing as it was very muddy no grass or pad not ideal.
Top location and one of the cleanest facilities I have ever stayed at.
Staff were welcoming and informative. Sites were large and easy access
Great caravan park, excellent camp kitchen
